title: Financial Stability Report
summary: This page is an index/navigation listing of Federal Reserve Financial Stability Reports dating from May 2018 through November 2025. The page does not contain the substantive content of any specific report—it merely provides links to HTML, PDF, and chart data files organized by publication date. The most recent report listed is from November 2025.
key_points: Source is a listing page, not an actual Financial Stability Report document
Available reports span May 2018 through November 2025 (approximately semi-annual publications)
Links provided to HTML, PDF, and Chart Data formats for each report
Some reports include supplementary statements (e.g., Vice Chair or Governor statements)
No substantive policy content, data, or analysis present in this source
why_it_matters: This source does not provide archiveable content. It is a navigation index that merely points to report files hosted elsewhere. A researcher seeking Financial Stability Report content would need to follow the specific report links (e.g., the November 2025 HTML or PDF) rather than rely on this page.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page with no substantive content (per Core Rule 6: reject)
